And you can count on this body cleanser to soften and condition your skin, without leaving behind any heavy residue. Using a rich lather, it harnesses the fragrance of spices, fruits and herbs to awaken your senses and refresh your entire body, turning an ordinary shower into a pampering spa experience. How to use: ● IN THE SHOWER: Smooth on body with moistened hands, puff or washcloth. Gently lather, then rinse. ● IN THE BATH: Dipense into running water. ● FOR SHAVING LEGS: Use as a skin-smoothing shaving gel. Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel Gold Lush ● cleans, softens & conditions skin without a heavy leave-behind residue. ● Your skin is left in better condition, feeling softer, smoother & renewed. ● The fragrant blend of spices, fruits & herbs provides a clean burst that awakens your senses & refreshes your entire body. Neutrogena Rainbath Replenishing Shower And Bath Gel Ocean Mist For Spa-Like Indulgence ● cleans skin without leaving behind a heavy residue – skin is left feeling soft and conditioned. ● The refreshing, tropical ocean mist fragrance enlivens the senses, while the rich, creamy lather rinses clean to wash the day away ● Replenish the look of your skin. product.highlights:
This top-selling shower and bath gel is one of our best body wash products. And you can count on this body cleanser to soften and condition your skin, without leaving behind any heavy residue. Using a rich lather, it harnesses the fragrance of spices, fruits and herbs to awaken your senses and refresh your entire body, turning an ordinary shower into a pampering spa experience.

How to use:

● IN THE SHOWER: Smooth on body with moistened hands, puff or washcloth. Gently lather, then rinse.

● IN THE BATH: Dipense into running water.

● FOR SHAVING LEGS: Use as a skin-smoothing shaving gel.

Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel Gold Lush

● cleans, softens & conditions skin without a heavy leave-behind residue.

● Your skin is left in better condition, feeling softer, smoother & renewed.

● The fragrant blend of spices, fruits & herbs provides a clean burst that awakens your senses & refreshes your entire body.

Neutrogena Rainbath Replenishing Shower And Bath Gel Ocean Mist For Spa-Like Indulgence

● cleans skin without leaving behind a heavy residue – skin is left feeling soft and conditioned.

● The refreshing, tropical ocean mist fragrance enlivens the senses, while the rich, creamy lather rinses clean to wash the day away

● Replenish the look of your skin.

Thank you for contacting us.

We are consistently ensuring that our products sold on Lazada are at least 18 months before product expiration date. We will provide an exchange if the product that was shipped does not comply within the safety period.

If you have any further enquiries, please do not hesitate to contact us

page_json.description: Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower Gel, a top-selling body wash that soothes and conditions skin. Its lightweight formula provides a spa-like experience with a refreshing blend of spices, fruits, and herbs in Ocean Mist and Mix fragrances. - Lazada

180142412.title: [Bundle of 3] GINVERA Natural Bath Shower Foam 950g [Body wash]
180142412.detail_text: Anti Bacterial Enriched with natural active ingredients such as Bio Mineral Vinegar Essence, Triclosan, Ginseng, Aloe Vera and Peppermint, it has triple anti-bacteria and anti-flammation properties. Thus, it effectively prevents the growth of bacteria and reduces the risk of infections while providing the skin with complete and effective nutrients. It helps to get rid of skin rashes, dry, cracked skin and is also a natural body deodorizer. During wash, you will feel energized and refreshed with a cooling sensation on your skin. After wash, an emollient film is formed on skin to protect against germs and your skin feels moisturized, healthy and smooth. Aloe Vera Enriched with natural active ingredients such as Aloe Vera and Green Tea Extracts, this hydrating shower foam provides effective hydration to your skin. It also provides complete and effective nourishment to your skin. Skin feels hydrated and soft after bath. Royal Jelly Milk Enriched with natural active ingredients such as Biogel, Honey, Ginseng, Aloe Vera, Royal Jelly and Milk protein Provides the skin with complete Effective nourishment to nourish your skin After wash, an emollient film is formed on skin to protect against environmental pollution Helps to prevent dry, cracked skin Your skin feels moisturized, soft and smooth after bath Floral Enriched with natural active ingredients such as Biogel, Ginseng, Aloe Vera, Chamomile and Lavender extracts Provides the skin with effective nutrients Soothing, restoring and balancing the body and mind An excellent treat for refreshing tired muscles, feet and head Helps to protect against dry skin After wash, skin becomes moisturized and soft and you will feel relaxed

13770875776.title: Double Sided Bath Brush - Long Handle Soft Bristle Back Scrubber for Shower Body Massage
13770875776.detail_text: Features: 1. Dual-purpose design combines a soft-bristle bath brush and an exfoliating back scrubber, offering a complete cleaning and massage experience in one tool. 2. Features two different sides: one with gentle PP bristles for soothing body cleansing, and another textured side for effective dead skin removal and deep exfoliation. 3. Long handle provides excellent reach for hard-to-access areas like the back, ensuring effortless self-cleaning without assistance. 4. Equipped with a built-in bath sponge on select models, enhancing lather and improving soap distribution for a richer bathing experience. 5. Ergonomic design with comfortable grip ensures secure handling, even in wet conditions, making it ideal for daily shower use. Specification: - Material: High-quality PP (Polypropylene) - Type: Dual-sided long-handled bath and massage brush - Function: Body exfoliation, back scrubbing, shower cleaning, skin massage - Handle Length: Standard long-handle design for easy reach - Size Options: Large premium size, compact standard size - Color Options: Nordic Blue with bath ball, Nordic Pink with bath ball, Nordic Green with bath ball - Suitable For: Universal use, all body types Package Include: Beauty & Personal Care
13770875776.detail_html:
Features:
1. Dual-purpose design combines a soft-bristle bath brush and an exfoliating back scrubber, offering a complete cleaning and massage experience in one tool.
2. Features two different sides: one with gentle PP bristles for soothing body cleansing, and another textured side for effective dead skin removal and deep exfoliation.
3. Long handle provides excellent reach for hard-to-access areas like the back, ensuring effortless self-cleaning without assistance.
4. Equipped with a built-in bath sponge on select models, enhancing lather and improving soap distribution for a richer bathing experience.
5. Ergonomic design with comfortable grip ensures secure handling, even in wet conditions, making it ideal for daily shower use.

Specification:
- Material: High-quality PP (Polypropylene)
- Type: Dual-sided long-handled bath and massage brush
- Function: Body exfoliation, back scrubbing, shower cleaning, skin massage
- Handle Length: Standard long-handle design for easy reach
- Size Options: Large premium size, compact standard size
- Color Options: Nordic Blue with bath ball, Nordic Pink with bath ball, Nordic Green with bath ball
- Suitable For: Universal use, all body types

Package Include:

Beauty & Personal Care

106673167.title: DOVE Nutrium Oxygen Moisture Body Wash 1L
106673167.detail_text: Dove Oxygen Moisture Body Wash adds a boost of moisture to your daily skin routine. Dove Oxygen Moisture Body Wash is made using NutriumMoisture, mixed with oxygen to help create a light, airy lather that leaves skin feeling fresh and clean, nourishing deeply as it cleanse. With Dove Oxygen Moisture Body Wash, your skin will feel softer with each use. Benefits of Dove Oxygen Moisture Body Wash * Leaves skin feeling refreshed and light to the touch * Instantly hydrates skin deeply to give skin a moisture boost * Cleanses and nourishes * Suitable for daily use Product Usage Pour into hand and work into a creamy lather. Then rinse off. For best results, use everyday.
106673167.detail_html:
Dove Oxygen Moisture Body Wash adds a boost of moisture to your daily skin routine. Dove Oxygen Moisture Body Wash is made using NutriumMoisture, mixed with oxygen to help create a light, airy lather that leaves skin feeling fresh and clean, nourishing deeply as it cleanse. With Dove Oxygen Moisture Body Wash, your skin will feel softer with each use.

Benefits of Dove Oxygen Moisture Body Wash

* Leaves skin feeling refreshed and light to the touch

* Instantly hydrates skin deeply to give skin a moisture boost

* Cleanses and nourishes

* Suitable for daily use

Product Usage

Pour into hand and work into a creamy lather. Then rinse off. For best results, use everyday.

  • Dry and Itchy Skin

2781396536.title: Yoko Spa Scrub Body Bath Salt Milk Protein Vitamin E Moisturizing and Exfoliating Skin Care 300g 350g - 18 Variants
2781396536.detail_text: Key Feature: Yoko Spa Scrub Body Bath Salt is a product designed to provide moisturizing and exfoliating benefits to the skin. With its key ingredients, milk protein, and vitamin E, it aims to promote healthier and more radiant-looking skin. Milk protein is known for its hydrating properties. It helps to nourish and moisturize the skin, leaving it softer and smoother. The protein content in milk can also contribute to improving skin elasticity and firmness. Vitamin E is a powerful antioxidant that helps protect the skin from environmental damage caused by free radicals. It can also support the skin's natural healing process and promote a more youthful appearance. When used as a bath salt, Yoko Spa Scrub can be added to warm water for a relaxing and rejuvenating bathing experience. The salt particles in the scrub act as natural exfoliants, gently removing dead skin cells and promoting cell turnover. This can result in a smoother and more even skin texture. 2781396536.detail_html:
Key Feature:

Yoko Spa Scrub Body Bath Salt is a product designed to provide moisturizing and exfoliating benefits to the skin. With its key ingredients, milk protein, and vitamin E, it aims to promote healthier and more radiant-looking skin.

Milk protein is known for its hydrating properties. It helps to nourish and moisturize the skin, leaving it softer and smoother. The protein content in milk can also contribute to improving skin elasticity and firmness.

Vitamin E is a powerful antioxidant that helps protect the skin from environmental damage caused by free radicals. It can also support the skin's natural healing process and promote a more youthful appearance.

When used as a bath salt, Yoko Spa Scrub can be added to warm water for a relaxing and rejuvenating bathing experience. The salt particles in the scrub act as natural exfoliants, gently removing dead skin cells and promoting cell turnover. This can result in a smoother and more even skin texture.

product.desc:
Key Feature:

Yoko Spa Scrub Body Bath Salt is a product designed to provide moisturizing and exfoliating benefits to the skin. With its key ingredients, milk protein, and vitamin E, it aims to promote healthier and more radiant-looking skin.

Milk protein is known for its hydrating properties. It helps to nourish and moisturize the skin, leaving it softer and smoother. The protein content in milk can also contribute to improving skin elasticity and firmness.

Vitamin E is a powerful antioxidant that helps protect the skin from environmental damage caused by free radicals. It can also support the skin's natural healing process and promote a more youthful appearance.

When used as a bath salt, Yoko Spa Scrub can be added to warm water for a relaxing and rejuvenating bathing experience. The salt particles in the scrub act as natural exfoliants, gently removing dead skin cells and promoting cell turnover. This can result in a smoother and more even skin texture.

page_json.name: Yoko Spa Scrub Body Bath Salt Milk Protein Vitamin E Moisturizing and Exfoliating Skin Care 300g 350g - 18 Variants
page_json.description: Milk protein is known for its hydrating properties Vitamin E used as a bath salt <html><head></head><body>Key Feature:Yoko Spa Scrub Body Bath Salt is a product designed to provide moisturizing and exfoliating benefits to the skin. With its key ingredients, milk protein, and vitamin E, it aims to promote healthier and more radiant-looking skin.Milk protein is known for its hydrating properties. It helps to nourish and moisturize the skin, leaving it softer and smoother. The protein content in milk can also contribute to improving skin elasticity and firmness.Vitamin E is a powerful antioxidant that helps protect the skin from environmental damage caused by free radicals. It can also support the skin's natural healing process and promote a more youthful appearance.When used as a bath salt, Yoko Spa Scrub can be added to warm water for a relaxing and rejuvenating bathing experience. The salt particles in the scrub act as natural exfoliants, gently removing dead skin cells and promoting cell turnover. This can result in a smoother and more even skin texture.VariationsYoko Lemon Spa Salt 300gYoko Lavender Spa Milk Salt 300gYoko Mixed Berry Spa Salt 300gYoko Vit-C Intense Brightening Booster Spa Salt 300gYoko Marine Collagen Spa Salt 300gYoko Spa Milk Salt 300gYoko Yogurt Spa Milk Salt 300gYoko Whitening Spa Salt 300gYoko Fresh Tomato Spa Salt 300gYoko Glow Salt Body Scrub Peach & Milk 350gYoko Glow Salt Body Scrub Watermelon & Milk 350gYoko Glow Salt Body Scrub Carrot & Milk 350gYoko Glow Salt Body Scrub Hiya & Cica 350gYoko Glow Salt Body Scrub Gluta Tomato 350gYoko Spa Salt Vit C Intense Brightening Booster 300gYoko Tamarind Gluta Glow Salt Scrub 300gYoko Spa Salt Arbutin Goji Berry 300gYoko Spa Salt Milk Hya8 300gYoko Spa Salt Milk Niacinamide 350g Yoko Spa Salt Coffee & Yuzu 350g Yoko Spa Salt Matcha & Strawberry 350g Product Specifications: Product Type: Scrub Body Bath SaltBrand: YokoWeight: 300g/350gIngredients/Composition: Sodium Chlorine, Sodium Laureth sulfate,Fragrance, Olive Fruit Oil,Milk Protein ,Vitamin B3,,Collagen,Vitamin ECountry of Origin: ThailandWhat You Will Receive: 1 x Yoko Spa Scrub Body Bath Salt (chosen variation)Expiry Date Guarantee: 6 Months Expiry Date Guarantee: We prioritize the freshness and quality of everyday products. We assure that any product you purchase from us will have a minimum of 6 months before its expiry date upon delivery. For products with naturally shorter shelf lives due to their manufacturing or preservation processes, we promise to deliver them with the maximum possible remaining shelf-life, well within their use-by dates. If any product you receive from us does not meet this guarantee, please contact our customer service team, and we will immediately address your concerns.</body></html>

3506406132.title: 🔥Yan Yan Xin Local Ready Stock🔥MAY SADOER Peach Pearl Shower Gel 300ml
3506406132.detail_text: Welcome to Yan Yan Xin Supermarket. We are a local seller in Singapore. We import from China and Malaysia directly. Ready stocks. Address： Blk632 Bedok Reservoir Rd, #01- 870，Singapore 470632 Product Name: MAY SADOER Honey Peach Pearl Body Wash Amino Acid Hyaluronic Acid Deep Gentle Cleansing Moisturizing Shower Gel Product Efficacy: Foam is rich and delicate, which can gently clean skin dirt, moisturize; purity and tender skin, brighten skin color, make skin fresh and smooth, and add fragrance, so that you can wash away the fatigue of the day, enjoy a pleasant bath experience. How to use: When bathing, apply proper amount of bath gel on the palm or bath ball, evenly smear it on the whole body, rub it to enrich foam, and rinse it with clean water after massage. Remarks: As everyones skin type is different, it is recommended testing it at skin behind your ear If irritation, skin hurts, injury or skin rashes develop, please do not use it and consult doctor. Stop using it immediately and seek help from a dermatologist in case of any allergic reactions. If the product accidentally splashes into eyes, rinse your eyes immediately. Notice: Use or use after the swelling, skin irratation, etc. Please temporarily disabled.
3506406132.detail_html:
Welcome to Yan Yan Xin Supermarket. We are a local seller in Singapore. We import from China and Malaysia directly. Ready stocks.

Address： Blk632 Bedok Reservoir Rd, #01- 870，Singapore 470632

Product Name: MAY SADOER Honey Peach Pearl Body Wash Amino Acid Hyaluronic Acid Deep Gentle Cleansing Moisturizing Shower Gel 

Product Efficacy:

Foam is rich and delicate, which can gently clean skin dirt, moisturize; purity and tender skin, brighten skin color, make skin fresh and smooth, and add fragrance, so that you can wash away the fatigue of the day, enjoy a pleasant bath experience.

How to use:

When bathing, apply proper amount of bath gel on the palm or bath ball, evenly smear it on the whole body, rub it to enrich foam, and rinse it with clean water after massage.

Remarks:

As everyones skin type is different, it is recommended testing it at skin behind your ear

If irritation, skin hurts, injury or skin rashes develop, please do not use it and consult doctor.

Stop using it immediately and seek help from a dermatologist in case of any allergic reactions.

If the product accidentally splashes into eyes, rinse your eyes immediately.

13781168415.detail_text: Product Overview Handcrafted with 100% natural plant ingredients, these vegan, cruelty-free bath bombs contain no preservatives, toxins or harsh additives. The mild, non-irritating formula is safe for all skin types, including sensitive skin and children, delivering a gentle, premium home SPA experience. Applicable Crowd & Scenarios Suitable for all adults and kids. Ideal for full-body baths, showers, hand spas and foot soaks for daily relaxation and skin care. Key Features 1. Stress & Muscle Relief Soothes nerve tension, eases joint and muscle stiffness, relieves congestion and fatigue to relax your body and mind. 2. Exfoliates & Smoothens Gently removes dead skin and rough cuticles on elbows, knees and heels, leaving skin soft, smooth and delicate. 3. Nourishes & Refreshes Infused with natural plant nutrients to moisturize and repair skin, preventing dryness and keeping skin fresh and revitalized. 4. Handmade & Rich Bubbles Carefully handmade for quick dissolution, creating dense, luxurious foam to upgrade your daily bathing ritual. 5. At-Home SPA Experience Enjoy soothing, aromatic professional-grade SPA care at home and release daily pressure easily. How to Use 1. Fill the tub with warm water. 2. Drop 1–2 bath bombs and wait for it to dissolve and foam. 3. Soak and enjoy the fragrant bubble bath. 4. Rinse your body thoroughly after use. Recommended: 2–3 times per week for optimal results. Warm Reminders 1. Perform a skin test behind the ear before first use. 2. Discontinue use and consult a doctor if redness, itching or irritation occurs. 3. Avoid eye contact. Rinse eyes immediately with clean water if contact happens.
13781168415.detail_html:
Product Overview

Handcrafted with 100% natural plant ingredients, these vegan, cruelty-free bath bombs contain no preservatives, toxins or harsh additives. The mild, non-irritating formula is safe for all skin types, including sensitive skin and children, delivering a gentle, premium home SPA experience.

Applicable Crowd & Scenarios

Suitable for all adults and kids. Ideal for full-body baths, showers, hand spas and foot soaks for daily relaxation and skin care.

Key Features

1. Stress & Muscle Relief

Soothes nerve tension, eases joint and muscle stiffness, relieves congestion and fatigue to relax your body and mind.

2. Exfoliates & Smoothens

Gently removes dead skin and rough cuticles on elbows, knees and heels, leaving skin soft, smooth and delicate.

3. Nourishes & Refreshes

Infused with natural plant nutrients to moisturize and repair skin, preventing dryness and keeping skin fresh and revitalized.

4. Handmade & Rich Bubbles

Carefully handmade for quick dissolution, creating dense, luxurious foam to upgrade your daily bathing ritual.

5. At-Home SPA Experience

Enjoy soothing, aromatic professional-grade SPA care at home and release daily pressure easily.

How to Use

1. Fill the tub with warm water.

2. Drop 1–2 bath bombs and wait for it to dissolve and foam.

3. Soak and enjoy the fragrant bubble bath.

4. Rinse your body thoroughly after use.

Recommended: 2–3 times per week for optimal results.

Warm Reminders

1. Perform a skin test behind the ear before first use.

2. Discontinue use and consult a doctor if redness, itching or irritation occurs.

3. Avoid eye contact. Rinse eyes immediately with clean water if contact happens.

product.desc:
Product Overview

Handcrafted with 100% natural plant ingredients, these vegan, cruelty-free bath bombs contain no preservatives, toxins or harsh additives. The mild, non-irritating formula is safe for all skin types, including sensitive skin and children, delivering a gentle, premium home SPA experience.

Applicable Crowd & Scenarios

Suitable for all adults and kids. Ideal for full-body baths, showers, hand spas and foot soaks for daily relaxation and skin care.

Key Features

1. Stress & Muscle Relief

Soothes nerve tension, eases joint and muscle stiffness, relieves congestion and fatigue to relax your body and mind.

2. Exfoliates & Smoothens

Gently removes dead skin and rough cuticles on elbows, knees and heels, leaving skin soft, smooth and delicate.

3. Nourishes & Refreshes

Infused with natural plant nutrients to moisturize and repair skin, preventing dryness and keeping skin fresh and revitalized.

4. Handmade & Rich Bubbles

Carefully handmade for quick dissolution, creating dense, luxurious foam to upgrade your daily bathing ritual.

5. At-Home SPA Experience

Enjoy soothing, aromatic professional-grade SPA care at home and release daily pressure easily.

How to Use

1. Fill the tub with warm water.

2. Drop 1–2 bath bombs and wait for it to dissolve and foam.

3. Soak and enjoy the fragrant bubble bath.

4. Rinse your body thoroughly after use.

Recommended: 2–3 times per week for optimal results.

Warm Reminders

1. Perform a skin test behind the ear before first use.

2. Discontinue use and consult a doctor if redness, itching or irritation occurs.

3. Avoid eye contact. Rinse eyes immediately with clean water if contact happens.

3601836275.title: SG Floral Bath Bombs | Fizzy Bubble Bath | Perfect for Christmas Gift, Presents Travel, Staycations
3601836275.detail_text: Perfect for: Staycations, Christmas Gifting, Self-Care Rituals, or unwinding after a long day. 🌹 4 SCENTS. 4 TARGETED BENEFITS. Each bath bomb is formulated with genuine essential oils (not cheap fragrance oils) to promote specific wellness benefits: 💜 LAVENDER DREAM (The Sleep & Skin Aid) Aromatherapy Focus: Calms the nervous system, reduces anxiety, and prepares the mind for deep, restful sleep. Targeted Skin Benefit: Promotes skin balance and deep moisture. Lavender helps restore the skin's natural barrier, leaving you soft, not stripped. 💛 CHAMOMILE SOOTHE (The Muscle Reliever) Aromatherapy Focus: Gentle, warm aroma known for its powerful soothing effects on the mind. Targeted Body Benefit: Relaxes tired and aching muscles. Chamomile's natural antispasmodic properties help melt away tension after a workout or a stressful week. 💖 ROSE LUXE (The Hydration Booster) Aromatherapy Focus: Classic, elegant, and uplifting scent that promotes feelings of well-being and romance. Targeted Skin Benefit: Intensely Moisturizing. Rose is a natural emollient, rich in antioxidants, that locks in hydration, leaving your skin soft, supple, and glowing. 💚 JASMINE UPLIFT (The Mood Enhancer) Aromatherapy Focus: Rich, sweet, and exotic scent often used to boost energy, improve mood, and aid concentration. Targeted Skin Benefit: Cleansing and soothing, perfect for rejuvenating the skin and senses. Weight per Unit: 100g Primary Ingredient: Sodium Bicarbonate, Citric Acid, Corn Starch, Natural Essential Oils Usage: Recommended for a single-use deep soak or use two (200g) for a truly luxurious, Lush-style aromatherapy experience. DIRECTIONS: Fill your tub with warm water. Drop one bath bomb in for a relaxing, single-use soak, or drop two bombs in simultaneously for a rich, ultra-luxurious 200g spa experience. Watch them fizz slowly, releasing the concentrated essential oils and rich botanicals. Soak for 20-30 minutes for maximum therapeutic benefit and skin absorption. Gift Box Not Included.
3601836275.detail_html:
Perfect for: Staycations, Christmas Gifting, Self-Care Rituals, or unwinding after a long day.

🌹 4 SCENTS. 4 TARGETED BENEFITS.

Each bath bomb is formulated with genuine essential oils (not cheap fragrance oils) to promote specific wellness benefits:

💜 LAVENDER DREAM (The Sleep & Skin Aid)

Aromatherapy Focus: Calms the nervous system, reduces anxiety, and prepares the mind for deep, restful sleep.

Targeted Skin Benefit: Promotes skin balance and deep moisture. Lavender helps restore the skin's natural barrier, leaving you soft, not stripped.

💛 CHAMOMILE SOOTHE (The Muscle Reliever)

Aromatherapy Focus: Gentle, warm aroma known for its powerful soothing effects on the mind.

Targeted Body Benefit: Relaxes tired and aching muscles. Chamomile's natural antispasmodic properties help melt away tension after a workout or a stressful week.

💖 ROSE LUXE (The Hydration Booster)

Aromatherapy Focus: Classic, elegant, and uplifting scent that promotes feelings of well-being and romance.

Targeted Skin Benefit: Intensely Moisturizing. Rose is a natural emollient, rich in antioxidants, that locks in hydration, leaving your skin soft, supple, and glowing.

💚 JASMINE UPLIFT (The Mood Enhancer)

Aromatherapy Focus: Rich, sweet, and exotic scent often used to boost energy, improve mood, and aid concentration.

Targeted Skin Benefit: Cleansing and soothing, perfect for rejuvenating the skin and senses.

Weight per Unit:

100g

Primary Ingredient:

Sodium Bicarbonate, Citric Acid, Corn Starch,

Natural Essential Oils

Usage:

Recommended for a single-use deep soak

or use two (200g) for a truly luxurious, Lush-style aromatherapy experience.

DIRECTIONS:

Fill your tub with warm water.

Drop one bath bomb in for a relaxing, single-use soak, or drop two bombs in simultaneously for a rich, ultra-luxurious 200g spa experience.

Watch them fizz slowly, releasing the concentrated essential oils and rich botanicals.

Soak for 20-30 minutes for maximum therapeutic benefit and skin absorption.

Gift Box Not Included.

3611555855.title: BEIMADUOJI | Foldable Large Baby Bath Tub
3611555855.detail_text: Specifications BrandBEIMADUOJISKU3611555855_SGAMZ-124632061755Baby Tub FeaturesCollapsibleBaby MaterialPPRecommended UserKids Highlights The BEIMADUOJI Foldable Large Baby Bath Tub features intelligent temperature sensing with a real-time digital water temperature display ensuring safe and comfortable baths. Its collapsible design folds to just 8cm thickness, saving space for easy storage and portability. The tub offers a comfortable reclined bathing position ideal for babies. A three-color temperature alert clearly indicates water safety levels: 26°C too low, 36°C ideal, 56°C too high, with seasonal recommendations for 37-38°C in summer and 38-39°C in winter. Made from durable PP material, it caters to parents seeking convenience and safety in baby bathing. Description If you want to report an issue with this item Click Here
